query:
comments on the col-031 (414) design? Critical risks the delivery agent must address:                             
  1. R-01 — Verify CAST(json_each.value AS INTEGER) against a live query_log  
  row (AC-08 is the CI gate)                                                  
  2. R-02 — Cold-start with phase=Some: ranking-preserving (not bit-for-bit   
  identical) — test both None and Some+cold paths in AC-11                    
  3. R-04/R-05 — AC-16 (extract.rs fix) must be complete before AC-12 (eval   
  gate) can be declared — these are non-separable deliverables             
  4. R-03 — Release PhaseFreqTableHandle read lock before the scoring loop    
  begins                                                                  
                                                                              
  One open type question for delivery: PhaseFreqRow.freq — resolve whether
  rusqlite returns i64 or u64 for COUNT(*) and reconcile SPECIFICATION.md vs  
  ARCHITECTURE.md.

entries.title: ADR-004 col-031: Activate w_phase_explicit at 0.05; AC-16 Non-Separable from AC-12
ADR-004 col-031: Lock Ordering for Three Arc<RwLock<_>> Handles on SearchService Hot Path
ADR-004 col-031: Activate w_phase_explicit at 0.05; AC-16 Non-Separable from AC-12 (superseded by #3688)
Pool selection for read-only context_status aggregates: always check compute_status_aggregates as direct precedent
Use pre-cloned lock snapshot for new pipeline steps — never re-acquire the lock
